items.line_en: Hello students, the topic of the essay is my favorite cartoon.

coach.say: Hello students, the topic of the essay is my favorite cartoon.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello students, / the topic of the essay is my favorite cartoon.

items.line_en: My favorite cartoon is Tom and Jerry.

coach.say: My favorite cartoon is Tom and Jerry.
coach.hint: Chunk it: My favorite cartoon is Tom and / Jerry.

items.line_en: Tom is a cat and Jerry is a mouse.

coach.say: Tom is a cat and Jerry is a mouse.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Tom is a cat and / Jerry is a mouse.

items.line_en: They live in a big house.

coach.say: They live in a big house.
coach.hint: Chunk it: They live in a big house.

items.line_en: Tom tries to cat Jerry, but Jerry always runs away.

coach.say: Tom tries to cat Jerry, but Jerry always runs away.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Tom tries to cat Jerry, / but Jerry always runs away.

items.line_en: Tom and Jerry have many funny adventures.

coach.say: Tom and Jerry have many funny adventures.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Tom and / Jerry have many funny adventures.
Chunk it: Sometimes Tom gets really mad.

items.line_en: Jerry is very clever and makes Tom look silly.

coach.say: Jerry is very clever and makes Tom look silly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Jerry is very clever and / makes Tom look silly.

items.line_en: I love watching their funny fights.

coach.say: I love watching their funny fights.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I love watching their funny fights.
Chunk it: They always make me laugh.

items.line_en: Tom and Jerry is the best cartoon ever.

coach.say: Tom and Jerry is the best cartoon ever.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Tom and / Jerry is the best cartoon ever.
